resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
resetPassword.authSessionExpired: Session expired. Please request a new reset link.

emailCheck.title: Check your email
emailCheck.message: We've sent a confirmation link to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and click the link to continue.

userNamePrompt.title: Create your username
userNamePrompt.description: Others can find you by your username.
userNamePrompt.subdescription: Username and visibility can be modified in settings later.

messages.resetLinkSent: Check your email for the password reset link

errors.emailExists: This email is already registered, please sign in or use another email
errors.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred, please try again
errors.unableToSignIn: Unable to sign in with {{provider}}. Please try another method or contact support.
errors.userNameMin: Username must be at least 3 characters
errors.userNamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores
errors.userNameTaken: This username is already registered, please enter a new username
errors.unableToSaveUsername: Unable to save username. Please try again.

approval.title: Account Pending Approval
approval.description: Your account is awaiting admin approval.
approval.approved: Your account has been approved! You can now sign in.
